toc.content: "我正在使用什么版本的 Ubuntu？"

pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["本镜像仅包含 32/64 位 x86 架构处理器的软件包，在 ARM(arm64, armhf)、PowerPC(ppc64el)、RISC-V(riscv64) 和 S390x 等架构的设备上（对应官方源为 ports.ubuntu.com）请使用 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../ubuntu-ports/","children":"ubuntu-ports 镜像"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["对于 Ubuntu 不再支持的版本，请参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../ubuntu-old-releases/","children":"Ubuntu 旧版本帮助"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在 Ubuntu 24.04 之前，Ubuntu 的软件源配置文件使用传统的 One-Line-Style，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"；从 Ubuntu 24.04 开始，Ubuntu 的软件源配置文件变更为 DEB822 格式，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"我正在使用什么版本的-ubuntu","children":"我正在使用什么版本的 Ubuntu？"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"可以通过以下命令查看当前系统版本："}],"
",["$r","SyntaxHighlight",null,{"code":"cat /etc/os-release","language":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"例如在 Ubuntu 24.04 下，文件内容如下："}],"
",["$r","SyntaxHighlight",null,{"code":"PRETTY_NAME="Ubuntu 24.04.1 LTS"
NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION_ID="24.04"
VERSION="24.04.1 LTS (Noble Numbat)"
VERSION_CODENAME=noble
ID=ubuntu
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://help.ubuntu.com/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/legal/terms-and-policies/privacy-policy"
UBUNTU_CODENAME=noble
LOGO=ubuntu-logo","language":"conf"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"VERSION_ID"}]," 后面的版本号即为当前系统版本，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"VERSION_CODENAME"}]," 后面的是代号。代号在软件源配置文件中会被使用。",["$r","strong",null,{"children":"请注意在下面的配置中选择符合你的机器的版本号，在替换配置前确认代号一致，否则之后的更新操作可能导致系统出现问题。"}]]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"配置内容","children":"配置内容"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"将系统自带的对应文件做个备份，然后根据格式的选择下面对应的内容替换，即可使用选择的软件源镜像。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"传统格式etcaptsourceslist","children":["传统格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Ubuntu 版本","items":[["Ubuntu 26.04 LTS",{"release":"resolute"}],["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release":"noble"}],["Ubuntu 25.10",{"release":"questing"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS",{"release":"jammy"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"启用 proposed","name":"proposed","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"properties","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"deb822-格式etcaptsourceslistdubuntusources","children":["DEB822 格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Ubuntu 版本","items":[["Ubuntu 26.04 LTS",{"release_deb822":"resolute"}],["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release_deb822":"noble"}],["Ubuntu 25.10",{"release_deb822":"questing"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS",{"release_deb822":"jammy"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"启用 proposed","name":"proposed","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"yaml","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"因镜像站同步有延迟，可能会导致生产环境系统不能及时检查、安装上最新的安全更新，不建议替换 security 源。"}]]}]
